entry.title: Re: Splitting Total Cost Recognized Values from RA at the...
entry.content: If I understand you requirement, you want to apply a different POC to different costs.  You will have to use a RA User Exit to modify the POC applied to the different Line IDs.

entry.title: Re: ISU Utilities Billing
entry.content: Can you please send me the docs to mihikaduttawork@gmail.com for ISU DM and Billing

entry.title: Help with the Query to Generate MRP Data
entry.content:
Dear Community Members,

I am trying to produce MRP Data by using following query. However, the output shows all same values. Can you please tell me what is wrong with the query, if anything wrong with the joins? Also I need to calculate Supply and Demand. How should I do this? 

SELECT
T0.[StartDate],
T0.[EndDate],
T0.[MsnCode],
T0.[Descr],
T1.[ItemCode],
T2.[ItemName],
T1.[DueDate],
T1.[OrderType],
SUM(T1.[Quantity]) as Quantity_ORCM,
SUM(T4.[Quantity]) AS Quantity_MSN,
SUM(T1.[Price]) AS Price,
SUM(T3.[Initial]) AS Initial,
SUM(T3.[InStock]) AS InStock,
SUM(T3.[OutStock]) AS OutStock,
SUM(T3.[Final]) AS Final,
T1.[Warehouse]
FROM
OMSN T0
LEFT JOIN
ORCM T1 ON T0.[AbsEntry] = T1.[ObjAbs]
LEFT JOIN
MSN2 T3 ON T3.[AbsEntry] = T0.[AbsEntry]
LEFT JOIN
MSN3 T4 ON T4.[AbsEntry] = T0.[AbsEntry]
LEFT JOIN
OITM T2 ON T1.[ItemCode] = T2.[ItemCode]
WHERE
T0.[Descr] = 'Bernhard'
AND T0.[MsnCode] = 'Planung'
AND T1.[ItemCode] = '48.4310.1399'
AND T0.[HldaysPurc] = 'Y'
AND T0.[GrpPeriods] = 'M'
GROUP BY
T1.[ItemCode],
T2.[ItemName],
T0.[StartDate],
T0.[EndDate],
T0.[MsnCode],
T0.[Descr],
T1.[DueDate],
T1.[OrderType],
T1.[Warehouse]

entry.title: Re: sales order item First Date
entry.content:
Hello community,

Please can we find 1st date in another table, VBAP LIPS LIKP?

i did a sqvi and can't join VBEP

entry.title: Goodbye Process Discovery, Pathfinder on Spotlight and Spotlight - Hello Discovery Edition!
entry.content:
Dear community,

The launch of the General Availability of SAP Signavio Process Insights, discovery edition on February 15th brought changes end of March. Read this blog post to be aware of the most important changes!


Customers wonder what lies ahead for Process Discovery, Pathfinder on Spotlight, and Spotlight?

For many years, our customers have used the offerings which provided insights into business process performance and benchmarking with industry peers, aiming for a SAP S/4HANA transformation or to optimize business processes. As we remain committed to our goal of continuous improvement, we've made significant progress in developing our offerings to serve our customers so that they can perform at their best.

With the advancement of the general availability of SAP Signavio Process Insights, discovery edition, we need to inform you that it is no longer possible to request Process Discovery, Pathfinder on Spotlight and Spotlight. Keep in mind that the complete sunset was on 31st of March, and in alignment with this decision, all existing analyses were deleted.

 

With saying goodbye, it is now the best time to get started with the free discovery version for all customers with an SAP maintenance contract.

SAP Process Insights, discovery edition incorporates elements from previous offerings, but it also includes a much wider scope of new features in comparison to process discovery, spotlight, and pathfinder.

Process Discovery, Pathfinder on Spotlight and Spotlight. Keep in mind that the complete sunset was on 31st of March, and in alignment with this decision, all existing analyses were deleted.

 

What’s new with SAP Signavio Process Insights, discovery edition:

  •        Root cause analysis, helping you to understand where the potential process issue come from and filtering capabilities to focus on a particular area
  •        Detailed information about indicators of your process performance
  •        Detailed list of documents
  •        Blockers and typical process break points (for one process flow)
  •        Value analysis with estimated monetary benefits. Access this blog for detailed information
  •        Choose 1 out of 3 process flows
  •        Now available: 8 languages German, French, Portuguese, Spanish, Simplified Chinese, Japanese, Korean and English. Get further insights here


We recommend you request the SAP Signavio Process Insights, discovery edition today. Explore the richness of getting to know your process flows as well as process indicators, recommended actions and innovation suggestions based on the latest technology, helping you to improve and gaining most value of your business.


We would like to inform you with an additional remark. The SAP Signavio Process Insights, discovery edition contains the same user interface experiences and comes with the same capabilities as the full edition. The difference is merely the limited scope and data in the discovery edition.

  • View the new functions: “Somehow it looks different”: New User Interface o... - SAP Community

Request your free analysis today: https://url.sap/discovery-edition


For any queries, please reach out to Signavio-Discovery@sap.com.

Kind regards,

Discovery team
SAP Signavio

entry.title: Re: sales order item First Date
entry.content: EDATU

entry.title: Re: What is serialisation in equipment & functional locat...
entry.content: Thanks

entry.title: 利用数据导出服务可视化数据变更日志
entry.content:
从使用SAC 计划的客户那里经常听到的一个需求是，当计划模型启用了数据审计时，如何在数据更改日志上创建报表和仪表盘。如今，SAC 为您提供了数据更改日志的简单列表，但这并不容易使用且缺乏安全控制。

在本博客中，我将向您介绍一种通过利用无外部工具或平台的数据导出服务和 OData 导入连接来实现此目的的方法。你可能已经学习了如何通过 Amanda 的博客在 SAC 租户之间复制数据，我们可以使用相同的方法在同b一 SAC 租户中加载审计数据。

前提条件：

  • SAC 租户是在 AWS、Azure、Ali Cloud 或 Google Cloud 中部署的 Cloud Foundry 租户。

步骤：

1. 设置 OAuth 客户端和 OData 连接

请遵循 Amanda 博客中有关如何在 SAC 租户中配置 OAuth 客户端和 OData 连接的确切步骤 1、2、3 和 4。

唯一的区别在于，OData 连接将在同一租户中创建并指向自身。

2. 使用新模型类型创建审计线索模型

a. 转到建模器 -> 创建新模型 -> 从数据开始 -> 选择数据源“OData 服务”

 

b. 选择您在步骤 1 中创建的 OData 连接，在本例中名称为“SELF-SALES_PLAN”->“下一步”

c. 在新查询屏幕中，选择“AuditData”->“下一步”

d. 选择“AuditData”的所有字段，可以选择设置过滤器，例如版本 -> 下一步

e. 在下一个屏幕中单击创建。

f. 现在，你将看到具有此类结构的模型，橙色框中的维与计划模型相同，而绿色框中的维和度量用于数据审计线索信息。

当然，你可以直接保存审计模型，但这不允许你利用公共维中维护的现有主数据、层次结构和数据访问控制（如果有）。

相反，我建议尽可能使用公用维来创建不含数据的新模型。请不要关掉此屏幕（作为审计数据结构的参考），并打开一个新的浏览器标签。

 

g. 在新的浏览器标签中，转到建模器 -> 创建新模型 -> 以空模型开始

 

h. 通过添加“现有维表（公用维）”来创建新维，还可以根据需要创建私有维。

 

i. 添加与计划模型相同的所有维，在我的案例中，如下所示：

j. 现在，通过参考步骤 f 中看到的审计结构，创建所有审计相关度量和维度，如下所示。请注意，对于维 AUDIT_USER，选择“不要添加维表”和数据类型“文本”，对于维 AUDIT_TIME，选择“不添加维表”和数据类型“时间戳”。

 

k. 对于含整数的计划模型的每个基本度量（1 = 删除、2 = 新建、3 = 更新），审计操作存储为“AUDIT_FLAG”。为了简化以后审计更改的报告，我为每个度量创建了一个数据类型为“文本”的审计操作字段。这是我的最终审核模型：

l. 保存模型。

 

3. 创建导入作业并加载审计数据

a. 在审计模型中，转到“数据管理”->“创建导入作业”-> 选择数据源“OData 服务”

b. 重复步骤 2 子步骤 b、c、d 和 e。

c. 单击“设置导入”

d. 现在，单击“切换自定义表达式编辑器”，使用表达式创建新列，将操作整数转换为可读文本。如有其他基本度量请执行相同操作。

[Action_Lcvalue] = if([AUDIT_FLAG_LCVALUE] == 1, "Delete", if([AUDIT_FLAG_LCVALUE] == 2, "New", if([AUDIT_FLAG_LCVALUE] == 3, "Update", "#")))

 

e. 在“映射到事实”的界面中，大多数维度和度量都应已映射，只需映射您在先前步骤中创建的附加审计操作字段即可。

f. 运行步骤以结束并运行导入。现在，您应该已经导入了审计数据。

 

4. 在故事中使用审核数据

根据需要使用所有 SAC 功能基于此审计模型创建故事。

小结：

  • 通过数据导出服务和 OData 导入连接，我可以快速设置 SAC 导入取模型，并使用我的计划模型中的数据更改日志来填充该模型。
  • 可以在此审计模型上创建任何类型的报表和仪表盘。
  • 在我的案例中，我已经对“Region”维设置了数据访问控制。通过重用此公用维，可以将相同的数据访问控制应用于我的审计模型。
  • 此方法不仅提供用于报告数据更改日志的选项，还提供了在同一租户中备份数据更改日志的选项。

entry.title: Re: Integration of User Provisioning (IAM) with SAP Field...
entry.content:
Hello, we'll endeavor to answer this from two directions. 

First, generally: The SAP Fieldglass open connector framework is a set of tools and APIs provided by SAP Fieldglass to enable integrations between SAP Fieldglass and any external system.  Refer to the SAP Help portal for a library of all standard SAP Fieldglass connectors.  The user/IAM-based connectors referenced in the question are in there, as well as many, many others. 

All SAP Fieldglass standard connectors are system-agnostic, and yes, middleware is typically required as is common in most cloud-to-cloud and cloud-to-on prem integrations.  Middleware brings the necessary infrastructure, tools, and capabilities to enable seamless communication, data transformation, and orchestration between cloud applications.  It abstracts away the complexities of integration from the applications in play, allowing organizations to focus on leveraging each to meet their business needs efficiently.

The connectors can be configured via a configuration manager account in SAP Fieldglass- see more information on configuration manager on the SAP Help portal.  You'll find that the fields required, processing logic, transfer method, etc will depend on the particular configuration of the SAP Fieldglass tenant.

 

Second, specific to the SAP family, SAP Cloud Identity Services allows customers to manage identities, authorizations and single sign-on across cloud and on-premise solutions.

Generally, SAP Cloud Identity Services are a group of services of SAP Business Technology Platform (SAP BTP), which enable you to integrate identity and access management between systems. The goal is to provide a seamless single sign-on experience across systems while ensuring that system and data access are secure. SAP Cloud Identity Services include Identity Authentication, Identity Provisioning, Identity Directory and Authorization Management.

More information specifically on the SAP Fieldglass + SAP Cloud Identity Services integrations can be found here on the SAP Help portal.

entry.title: Re: How to find an archiving object for a table in S/4HAN...
entry.content:
Hi @2024_Hanami 

 

My understanding the only way currently in S/4HANA Cloud is to Navigate to the Application area in the S/4HANA Cloud Help documentation to find the archiving object for the area like MM_MATNR

and then using the corresponding application area under Virtual Data Model and CDS Views

to find released CDS view for this area to find out what tables it encompasses

I checked internally but could find no app like SARA - "Database Tables" or DB15  that could do this 

Best Regards

Enda

entry.title: Re: Enterprise Management Layer for SAP S/4HANA – What’s New – Release 2023

Now that EML is part of RISE, is it available for free and the system is delivered by SAP quicker than RISE system with Best Practice Content ?

entry.title: SAP Business One
entry.content:
Hello SAP community, how are you?

I need support with SAP Business One, I created two users with the same parameters, but there is a field that appears only for one of them. When accessing the A/P Invoices for one of the users the NF No. appears while for the other this field does not appear, could you help me how to add it? Images below.

entry.title: SAP Analytics Cloud publication issue after time shift
entry.content:
Hi,

in SAP Analytics Cloud, I experience some remarkable behaviour with story publications after the shift to German summertime on the last weekend (time shifted by +1 hour).

First, all publications were not shifted by an hour, so they were all sent an hour too late. Is there a possibility to avoid this? Takes some effort to re-schedule all publications twice every year.

Second, some of the publications were not sent out with the error "Schedule cancelled because slots are not available", although there was no other publication schedule for the next 2 hours. Only idea so far is to manually re-schedule the entire publication.

Thanks a lot for your help 🙂

 

Best, Mat

entry.title: Excel uploading error msg
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

Since I changed desktop PCs to a number of my users I face the problem that most of them are not being able to upload an Excel file, no matter if it's a .xls or .xlsx. I installed/uninstalled Office, I resetted Office, Windows Clipboard is off, Excel Clipboard is empty but I'm still receiving an error that the size on the clipboard is too large. No obvious reason to resonate this outcome after all.

I'm creating a new post since I saw on the past the same question but unfortunately with no good answers-results that also didn't work for me.

Thank you all for your contribution regarding this matter because it's a daily task for us and creates a lot of confusion. 

Regards,

Ioannis

Can you please help  with the video access for the videos in this blog?

entry.title: Re: Implementer's Guide to Rapid Financial Planning & Analysis for SAP S/4HANA using SAP Analyti

Hi @MarkPBurke 

the URL  rapid.sap.com/bp just redirects to me.sap.com/processnavigator . is there a diffrent way of getting to the Best Processes explorer now?

entry.title: Re: Can't remove any fields in "Request Maintenance"-App (F1551) through "UI Adaption
entry.content: The flex box ID is a generated ID so it's not allowing removal of the control. Allowing such an action could result in some unintended control being removed at runtime. If you view the page controls at runtime with a browser inspector you would only be able to remove controls that have a statically designated ID.

entry.title: Re: BAdIs for MRP
entry.content: Yea,sure it make sense to have a separate thread ,may be it will be useful for others

entry.content:

I am working on SAP Classic product compliance (Discrete industry) and client is looking for comparison with New product compliance. (Product marketability and compliance)

I have proposed to them that currently, Product compliance and marketability does not cover discrete industry, as per SAP road map.

Does the product compliance have functionality to connect with EU SCIP database.

Can you please give some insight so that it will help to understand the functionality.

Thanks

Shailesh Thakur

entry.title: Error from API
entry.content: I need help please. When my api sends appgyver an error such as status:400 in this case. I need the error message to tell the user what is wrong. But appgyver is not receiving the error message for some reason. It only receives successful calls.

Would it be possible to convert HTML to PDF in SAP CPI?

Naresh

entry.title: Re: Project Billing for Customer Projects in SAP S/4HANA Cloud
entry.content:
Hello Johannes, 

Our Professional Services scenario in S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition is currently not meant for quotation management. Such a capability is also not planned on the roadmap. 

Best regards, Andreas

entry.title: Re: Access to Transaction SE16 on Production
entry.content: One inconvenience we have with SE16 restricted is that we cannot browse contents from SE11 as it is hard coded in SE11's PAI XX_COMMS. Are there any newer versions where this can be configured?

entry.title: Role description for manufacturing
entry.content:
Does anyone have a good role description for the different roles in SAP manufacturing?  

There is one I found for the PEO (see link) but would like to see if there is one for the normal production with a good explanation for the roles and their responsibilities. 

PEO Metro Map (Roles and Tasks) | SAP Help Portal

entry.title: SQL Query to Produce MRP Report
entry.content:
Dear Community Memebers,

I wish to produce MRP report and created a basic query. However, the output produces same values and hence it does not work corrrectly. Can you please check the query and tell me if anything is wrong or perhaps the joins?

I also need to calculate Supply and Demand as seen in the MRP Wizard output. How this can be done?

Following is the query I created:

 

SELECT
T0.[StartDate],
T1.[ReleasDate],
T0.[EndDate],
T0.[MsnCode],
T0.[Descr],
T1.[ItemCode],
T2.[ItemName],
T1.[DueDate],
T1.[OrderType],
SUM(T1.[Quantity]) as Quantity_ORCM,
SUM(T4.[Quantity]) AS Quantity_MSN,
SUM(T1.[Price]) AS Price,
SUM(T3.[Initial]) AS Initial,
SUM(T3.[InStock]) AS InStock,
SUM(T3.[OutStock]) AS OutStock,
SUM(T3.[Final]) AS Final,
T1.[Warehouse]
FROM
OMSN T0
LEFT JOIN
ORCM T1 ON T0.[AbsEntry] = T1.[ObjAbs]
LEFT JOIN
OITM T2 ON T1.[ItemCode] = T2.[ItemCode]
LEFT JOIN
MSN2 T3 ON T3.[AbsEntry] = T0.[AbsEntry] AND T2.[ItemCode]=T3.[ItemCode]
LEFT JOIN
MSN3 T4 ON T4.[AbsEntry] = T0.[AbsEntry] AND T4.[ItemCode] = T3.[ItemCode]

WHERE
T0.[Descr] = 'Bernhard'
AND T0.[MsnCode] = 'Planung'
AND T1.[ItemCode] = '48.4310.1399'
AND T0.[HldaysPurc] = 'Y'
AND T0.[GrpPeriods] = 'M'
GROUP BY
T1.[ItemCode],
T2.[ItemName],
T0.[StartDate],
T1.[ReleasDate],
T0.[EndDate],
T0.[MsnCode],
T0.[Descr],
T1.[DueDate],
T1.[OrderType],
T1.[Warehouse]

entry.title: Re: Can't remove any fields in "Request Maintenance"-App (F1551) through "UI Adaption
entry.content:
Hi Ryan,

thanks for your answer!

Yes, I know that the generated ID is the problem. But this app was delivered by the SAP with the option to adapt the UI.

What do you mean by "flex box ID"? In my UI5 inspector I only see one "Flex Box", it is the very top search bar of the FLP ShellHeader.

The field I want to remove has a statically designated ID:

I also can't remove fields, which I just added through the "UI adaption"-mode. I get the same error message.


I have that feeling, that there is some sort of a bug in that application.

entry.title: Integration Suite - DataStore - Recommendations
entry.content:
Hi Fellow SAPers, 

I have see several blogs on how to create DataStore and select data from datastore using Write, Select - operations. 

I understand that data store is not a database table. 

Can you please share your thoughts on using datastores in the prod scenarios ?

entry.title: Re: HTML to PDF in SAP CPI
entry.content:
If you have a usable library in CPI that can convert HTML into a PDF file, then you would be able to do it.

 

Regards,

Ryan Crosby

entry.title: Re: Splitting Total Cost Recognized Values from RA at the...
entry.content:
Yes but the different Percentage Split (not POC) to be applied is not while calculating the RA (which will still the use the POC from Progress) but at the time of posting RA values during settlement as defined in OKG8. I am attaching a small sample example in the attached excel.

And to derive the Percentage Split we are building a custom table - in short while calculating RA we consider all cost categories but settlement of RA values to be posted to only 3 cost categories out of the many and hence I have set up OKG8 to post cost accrual /deferral to only the 3.

The Percentage split to be used to split the total cost accrual/deferral amount while posting the RA to FI (CJ88)

entry.title: SAP Deployment over Intune - Auto Update failed
entry.content:
Hey guys,

I hope you can help me. I deployed SAP GUI and the rest via Intune and PSADT. Everything works well. However, when I try to auto-update SAP GUI, for example, it fails.

Can someone help me troubleshoot it?

Regards

entry.title: Data analysis in relatation to BSID and BSAD
entry.content:
Hi,

I'm building a report which analyses customer related accounting informations contained in BSID and BSAD. What I understood so far is that BSID contains open (non - cleared ) items and BSAD contains cleared items. 

I've discovered that the column [BELNR] cannot be used as a unique identifier for accounting documents. CHAT-GPT is saying that the unique identifier for accounting documents in BSID and BSAD is composite key of the following fields: [BUKRS], [KUNNR], [GJAHR] and [BELNR] this on a document basis on a line basis also [BUZEI] would need to be included. 

My first question would be, is this information correct?

My next question is in relation to the clearing items contained in the field [AUGBL]. This field seems to contain the [BELNR] of the clearing item, but the [BELNR] is again not unique across the tables. I find multiple items if I search for the clearing item with only the [BELNR] which is provided in the [AUGBL] field. 

How can I solve this issue or am I not getting something correctly?

Thanks in advance

Best regards

entry.title: Is it possible to post document with Secondary Cost Element by apps Post General Journal Entries
entry.content:
--- Product/Function ---
No predicted product
User selected product: SAP S/4HANA Cloud (Recent)
No predicted product function
User selected product function: SAP S/4HANA Cloud > Finance > Accounting and Financial Close > General Ledger Accounting > Reporting and Analysis (Recommended)
Predicted component: FI-FIO-GL (Product Function)

--- TagID/AreaID ---
TagID: #3
AreaID: 00109B36D6221EDBB0C0294B431680E8

--- Steps to Reproduce ---

*Note To SAP:
I give approval for SAP Support to use these Steps to Reproduce, while connected to my impacted non-production environments, even if the steps result in a change being made and my approval remains valid until the issue is resolved, unless I inform SAP Support otherwise.

--- Description ---

Hi,dear teams

I'm facing a issue that it is possible to post document with Secondary Cost Element by apps Post General Journal Entries?
As we all know,the secondary cost element can't be posted directly in general.
Please kindly check the attachment.

But once on my previous On-Premise project,I remember that it can be acheieved by configurating some points.
So I wonder it is also possible to do the same on S4HC?

Thank you very much.

entry.title: Re: Integration Suite - DataStore - Recommendations
entry.content: Think about your potential use case while paying attention to the 32GB limit per tenant.

entry.title: Re: Splitting Total Cost Recognized Values from RA at the...
entry.content: You have to modify the RA calculations so the values to be settled are correct. If you do it at settlement you have to recalculate the RA values.

entry.title: Handling Inventory Adjustments with Posting Dates in a Previous Fiscal Year
entry.content:
I need to book an inventory accrual adjustment for audit consideration pertains to transactions that should have been posted in a previous fiscal year, the process becomes more complex due to the closed status of that fiscal year in the system. Currently April and March 2024 posting periods are opened but what I need to do is to have that entry in December 2023. Is there a way to do that?

Thanks

entry.title: Regarding restrictions when referring to document type "SC"
entry.content:
I would like to use the general journal posting app to record BS accounts in different profit centers for each item.
To do this, we would like to use the document type "SC" instead of the document type "SA" to create documents for normal posting documents as well, since we will be splitting the documents.

If the above measures are taken, could you please let me know if there are any apps that will no longer be usable or if there are any restrictions?

entry.title: Re: Troca de arquivos bancários através do Bank Communication Management (BCM)
entry.content:
Ola Pessoal, Tudo bem?

 

Atualmente os cliente estão solicitando integração bancaria via API (que os bancos esta disponibilizando).

Oque a SAP disponibiliza para fazer as integrações de remessa, retorno, extrato. Pois todas as transações SAP (s/4 Hana) para estes processos são baseados em arquivos.

entry.title: Re: Announcing General Availability of SAP Build Code: Speed up development with generative AI
entry.content: @mark_wright is there an ETA for abap support? Right now it only produces JS and Java.

entry.title: Consider Customer Consignment Stock in Classic MRP as Available stock MD02,MD04
entry.content:
Hello All,

Recently we have a requirement for considering the customer consignment stock as available stock in MRP planning .

I know that the special stock is not considered in MRP. Assuming that it is a existing element therefore tried to use BADI-MD_CHANGE_MRP_DATA method CONSIDER_CUSTCONSIGNMENT to Influence that MRP considers the CCS as available stock i have done below changes.

  METHOD if_ex_md_change_mrp_data~consider_custconsignment.
    ch_no_exit = abap_true.
    ch_changed = abap_true.
  ENDMETHOD.   

While running the MD02 and MD04 the BADI itself it is not triggering, i don't what mistake i have done here .

I also tried with BADI -  MD_ADD_ELEMENTS method ADD_CHANGE_ELEMENTS the with changing parameters CH_COPY_MDPSX,CH_CHANGED to X in this case the Badi got triggered but no value changed in MD04 .

Notes referred - 2012620,301681,3256475

I have attached the screenshots for MMBE and MD04

for example we have customer consignments stock 480 unrestricted stock and the same need to appear in Md04 available stock highlighted below

Can someone throw some light on this topic it would be really helpful, thanks 

tagging for better reach MAN Production Planning (PP) SCM APO Production Planning and Detailed Scheduling (PP/DS) MAN Material Requirements Planning @Caetano @annadurai_kalaiselvan@ 

iris_zimmermann

entry.title: Goods Receipt Outbound Delivery Requirement Type B is Not Allowed
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I am getting an error when I wanted to GR in Reference of PO Document with MvT 101:

I have set the following configuration in WM:

Am I missing something? Are there items within the configuration that I should have left unchecked or have not checked?

Thanks.

entry.title: Re: RFC Communication failure-recurring data services job
entry.content:
Hi Julian, Currently we're using BODS Version 4.3 SP2

Regards,

Siba

entry.title: Re: How to use CDS View in Calculation View?
entry.content:
Yes, if you are running SQL statement directly on HANA layer of the source system, you will face the same issue.
The workaround in the case is the run the following statement prior to do a SELECT on the CDS view:
SET 'CDS_CLIENT'='001';
Note that this statement and the SELECT should be done in the same SQL console to keep the session context.

entry.title: Re: Where Guided Sourcing meets SLP
entry.content: Excellent blog, Alia, highlighting the interplay of the information between the SLP and Sourcing solutions, which cumulatively delivers enhanced value to the customer.

entry.title: No item type determined for lower-level item (OUTB DLG) error in SMQ2
entry.content:
Hello,

When I maintain the complete delivery indicator in ERP delivery and trigger to EWM, its stuck in smq2 with error "No item type determined for lower-level item (OUTB DLG)". If I don't maintain the indicator, the queue is processed, and deliveries are received in EWM. 

I have activated delivery split at delivery type level. let me know what the possible reasons could be?

Thanks!

entry.title: Re: Integration Suite - DataStore - Recommendations
entry.content:
Thank you. 

32GB limit per tenant. I agree. 

From your experience, any issues/ any other considerations would be helpful

I registered for the event on 25th of March but couldn't able to see my name and also no mail prior to this.

Is it I am not registered for event

entry.title: Re: How to get all sernr of material at specific lgort
entry.content:
You can find information in tables SER03 and OBJK, by searching for the last movement of the PN/SN.
(In fact, this SN may be in some special stock such as supplier, customer, transit, etc.)

entry.title: Re: Integration Suite - DataStore - Recommendations
entry.content: The one other consideration is your flow design and whether you need local or global scope. Local scope means the datastore is only visible within that flow, but global means other flows can access the datastore.

entry.title: SSO error in multiple domain - SAP BusinessObjects - Only the primary domain works in SSO
entry.content:
Hi,

I have a problem in Single-Sign-On on SAP Business Object 4.3 SP4 across multiple domains.
Single-sign-on works on the primary domain but not on others.
Manual login works for all domains.
I have set the following SPNs:

HTTP/hostname.domain.com serviceaccount
HTTP/hostname serviceaccount
BICMS/serviceaccount.domain.com serviceaccount

In the CMC, in Windows Active Directory, Service principal name is: BICMS/serviceaccount.domain.com

In global.properties I set:
idm.princ=serviceaccount
idm.realm=DOMAIN.COM (in ALL CAPS)

The Keytab file was created as follows: ktpass -out bosso.keytab -princ serviceaccount@DOMAIN.COM -pass "complexpassword" -kvno 255 -ptype KRB5_NT_PRINCIPAL -crypto ALL

SSO test with kinit works for all domains from the Command Prompt:
kinit USEROTHERDOMAIN@OTHERDOMAIN.COM
Response: New ticket is stored in cache file...

When I try to log in to SSO with secondary domain users, I am redirected to the BI Launchpad logon page and there are no errors in stderr.log.
In Wireshark I find the error KRB5KDC_ERR_S_PRINCIPAL_UNKNOWN

Server Intelligence Agent is running with: DOMAIN\serviceaccount

For the configurations I followed the guide note 2629070.

Do you have any suggestions for resolution?

Thank you

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Hi,

Gostaria de ajuda para escolher o idioma do teste. Não tem a opção de português na corrida C_TS412_2021. Vou escolher o inglês, mas gostaria de usar a ferramenta de tradução e vi que isso é possível. Tenho que sinalizar isso de alguma forma quando programo o teste?

Ou isso é aconselhado e escolhido apenas no momento do teste? Como posso me preparar para essa solicitação? Você pode me ajudar por favor? Gostaria de entender como proceder para ter acesso a essa opção da ferramenta de tradução ao fazer o teste. Obrigado

entry.title: Re: Getting "Joule not available" in SAP Build Code
entry.content: Unfortunately, I haven't. 😞

entry.title: Re: Error "The entry is missing in T009" during PO creation
entry.content: The entry is missing in T009

entry.title: Navigation not working in BUILD app when accessed via C4C Mashup
entry.content:
Hello Fellow Builders,

We have a very peculiar case where the navigation from one page to another page is working fine in SAP BUILD Apps preview, but when we access the same page via the SAP C4C mashup window, it shows a different behavior. So this is what happens in SAP BUILD Apps Preview- 

1) We have a main page from which we routes to the details page

2) The app stays on the details page and we have provided a back button with which we can come back to the main page. 

3) So until we press the back button, the app continues to display the details page.

And this is what happens when do the same navigation via the SAP C4C mashup window, where this SAP BUILD app is embedded.

1) Similar to the above scenario, the app allows to navigate from Main screen to details screen.

2) But immediately after showing the detail screen, it jumps back automatically to the main screen and then it stops loading the main screen data also, as the API calls somehow breaks during the automatic back navigation. 

Has anyone else faced this kind of situation before? Or if someone can help us understand how to resolve this, would be highly appreciated. Thanks.

BR,

Yogesh

entry.title: Re: System log in SLT
entry.content: Hi Andrey, Thanks for your prompt response, but does executing T Code SM21 in our current SLT Prod env. would impact our current SLT monitoring / my SLT access account ?

entry.title: Re: Important Update: Changes to the Free Tier Option for SAP BTP ABAP Environment
entry.content:
Can you elaborate the impact on the Custom Code Migration app that fits well into the free tier option? Check also the blog post Try It for Free: SAP Fiori App Custom Code Migration in the Cloud .

Thanks a lot

entry.title: EWM - Delete Handling Unit when adding to existing Handling Unit - Putaway strategy
entry.content:
Hello SAP expert,

I have the following situation. I have a storage type (RL05) for a rack storage. Most important settings for the storage type are:

  • Putaway rule 2: Addition to Existing Stock/Empty Bin
  • HU requirement X: HU is required
  • WT Generic 2: Only Storage type is suggested by the system (the workers in the warehouse want to choose the bin by themself...)
  • Mixed storage/Mixed storage in HUs: no restrictions
  • Level Add. to Stock H: Addition to Stock at Highest HU Level

Rest of the settings see screenshots:

 

To the case:
For example I have the HU 810000167 with a quantity of 1 ton of the product 1000000058 on the bin RL05-01-01-01-03. 

Then I get a new inbound delivery of the same product (or also another product) with maybe 0,5 tons and I want to put those 0,5 tons to the existing HU 810000167 and throw away the Handling Unit where the 0,5 tons were on. We are working with Handling Units 100% of the time and create the Handling Units already in the delivery with the Fiori App. And when doing the putaway to the existing HU, I get of course a nested Handling Unit. 

New inbound delivery with warehouse task of the product:

Confirm the warehouse task in the foreground to the existing HU 810000167 which is already on the bin:

Then the stock looks like this on the bin with a nested Handling Unit:

Is there a way to set up the system to delete the Handling Unit when adding it to another HU so I avoid that a nested Handling Unit is created?
What I would like to have as a result is only the HU 810000167 with a quantity of 1,5 tons. 

Thanks in advance!

entry.title: Re: Converting C Code to Abap
entry.content: So you should first look at some Abap tutorial first ?

entry.title: Re: System log in SLT
entry.content:
tcode SM21 is system monitoring transaction and nothing to do with SLT itself.
But it could tell you why job was canceled (of course, if it was not canceled by user)

entry.title: Re: Addressing Common Questions and Complaints About the New Platform
entry.content:
Hi, @nathaliequiblier:

Yes, it's possible, but may I ask what blog post you want to edit and why? Please keep in mind that it's against our policy to update old blog posts. I explain that in the Blog Formatting Post-Migration section above.

Kind regards,

--Jerry

entry.title: Re: Refurbishment Process in Plant Maintenance
entry.content: Thanks for the blog. I guess this works well if you know the price of refurbishment when the material is shipped to the vendor. What would you recommend if the price of refurbishment is only determined after the vendor examined the material?

entry.title: Re: Faturamento dos custos de serviço via SAP CS e SD
entry.content:
Eliel,

Thank you very much for this amazing explanation of the process. I have 2 questions, though. This is a standard process from SAP. Does it work in Brazil? Is it "localized" for Brazil? I imagine we can change the goods receipt movement and the movement used to return the repaired equipment to automatically trigger a nota fiscal. Is my assumption correct? I suppose the material we receive will enter into non-valuated sales order stock because it should not be part of our books. Is this the way the process works?

entry.title: How leading global Chemicals Supplier BYK harmonized Supply Chain Planning across Divisions
entry.content:
BYK is a leading global supplier of specialty chemicals. The company’s innovative additives and differentiated solutions optimize product and material properties as well as production and application processes. Amongst other products, BYK’s high-performance additives improve scratch resistance and surface gloss, the mechanical strength or flow behavior of materials, and properties such as UV- and light stability or flame retardancy. BYK also produces measuring and testing instruments that serve to effectively assess appearance and physical properties.

To better react to market changes and expand its competitive edge BYK saw the need to select and implement a new supply chain demand planning system.

Inefficient Processes and Lack of Data Visibility negatively Impacted Forecasts

The company was challenged with inefficient, diversified, and isolated supply chain demand planning processes on disparate legacy planning systems that impeded forecast accuracy. Therefore, the goal was to enhance data and process transparency and establish one source of truth for sales, operations, and demand-planning processes.

Integrated Approach to address Demand Planning Processes holistically

BYK found that SAP Integrated Business Planning for demand  – a cloud-based solution with comprehensive capabilities – could best meet its goals to harmonize demand planning processes across the organization and improve forecast accuracy. In addition, the company decided to use the SAP Supply Chain Control Tower solution which is enabling the company to get real-time visibility and control over its supply chain.

For the implementation and deep solution know-how BYK sought help from SAP Services and Support and SAP Preferred Success service which included architecture planning, implementation guidance, and process reengineering expertise. Moreover, SAP helped deploy SAP Integrated Business Planning for demand and SAP Supply Chain Control Tower in a technically standardized and lean way.

Enabling all Functions with a Single Source of Truth to Improve Decision-Making

Major benefits BYK achieved include:

  • Improved collaboration by implementing a harmonized and automated demand planning process
  • Simplified and integrated planning practices for sales, demand planning, supply chain management, controlling, and strategic supply planning teams with more than 200 users
  • Created one platform as single source of truth and improved data quality and process transparency across sales, operations, and demand-planning processes
  • Increased forecast accuracy with real-time data reflecting changes to planned demand
  • Enabled quantity and value-based planning for all planning teams to make decisions based on financial impact

Matthias Beenen, Supply Chain Process Management, BYK remarked: “With SAP Services and Support, we successfully implemented SAP Integrated Business Planning for demand and SAP Supply Chain Control Tower, enabling precise and accurate demand planning. This is critical to supply chain efficiency and for delivering high quality service to our customers.”

He concluded “In the future we will continuously work on optimizing the implemented processes and extend the SAP Integrated Business Planning platform by adding subsequent supply chain planning processes”.


To learn how an integrated approach to planning helps you run a sustainable, risk-resilient supply chain in the face of constant change click here. To understand how AI helps with supply chain planning click here.
Also, read how to avoid risk by building visibility and collaboration into supply chain planning by clicking here. Check out what benefits other customers achieved by clicking here.

entry.title: Re: S4HANA Web UI Kit v1.106 for Figma
entry.content: Thank you for the quick response! Appreciate the information.

entry.title: Auto sequencing of transports in CHARM
entry.content:
we have multiple transports created in charm however one of them had an import error and was imported again later authomatically with the charm but the correct sequence was not maintained as per the charm transport sequence .We realize that in order to preserve the proper object sequence, charm will take into account the other transports included in the same charm ticket and reimport each transport once again. somehow this is not happening . would you please let us know if there are certain configuration required to achieve this. 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Auto sequencing of transports in CHARM
entry.content:
Dear Customer,

Kindly check below and has detailed information in the KBAs and wikis.

In the standard there is not option to change the import sequence, the Import Sequence is determined, by TMS rather than ChaRM, based on the Transport Request release sequence for the first target system of the consolidation route, then the import sequence in the follow-on system will depends on the import sequence on the previous target system.

Until SAP Solution Manager 7.2 SP08, you could use the Status Dependent Import strategy provided by ChaRM to change the import sequence of the transport requests using the Change Document as unit.

2754398 - How to manage dependencies between Transport Requests when importing using ChaRM

Import of the TR is based on the sequence in which the TR is available in the import queue, and it is not dependent on when object is activated. 
Kindly go through the KBA:

0002213705 - Mass Transport Strategy and Sequencing

2209623 - Transports out of sequence while importing via ChaRM

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/transport-buffer-with-wrong-sequence-of-transports/ba-p/13300355

Thanks & Regards,

Jayabharathi

entry.title: Re: Rename /replace different vaues on of one column in a...
entry.content:
Hi

I was looking for help on using the Replace formula in Stories and came across your question. As you haven't had a response I thought I would offer mine.

I'm new to Stories but I'm assuming you can't put multiple formulas like the below together so I'm guessing you would need to have 2 separate calc. columns for the 2 examples you gave. If you have hundreds to change then this might not be practical.

The first calculated field would be the first one below. That would convert "ele_01010316" to "Strength Area Peer Comment". The second one would convert "ele_11010316 to "Strength Area Manager Comment".

First Calculated Column name is SAPC and formula is Replace (Field_ID_Competency_ID, "ele_01010316" , "Strength Area Peer Comment")

Second Calculated Column name might be SAMC and formula is Replace (Field_ID_Competency_ID, "ele_11010316" , "Strength Area Manager Comment")

Then a third calculated column called Section would simply check to see which of the 2 above contains the answer and just return that one. Formulas would be:-

If ([SAPC]>"" ,[SAPC],If([SAMC]>"",[SAMC]",""))

Hope it helps.

Mike

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Hi David,

I am a 3rd year student studying at the University of Economics and Law (affiliated with Ho Chi Minh City National University). I love SAP ERP through the lecturer's lectures and wish to follow SAP ERP in the future. I have already got TS410 certificate before. Because of that, I want to learn step by step and get this certificate . They will help me gain a lot of knowledge and experience.

Best Regard,
Vy Nguyen.

entry.title: Re: Regarding restrictions when referring to document typ...
entry.content:
Hi Yusuke,

The Post General Journal Entries app can create your manual documents SA and SC.

The restrictions for this app are:

- You cannot use a G/L Account with open items

- You cannot use a G/L Accounts of Fixed Assets

- You cannot use a G/L Accounts of Secondary Cost

- You cannot use Reconciliation Accounts (E.g. Customers, Supplier)

- You cannot use G/L Accounts with the "Post Automatically Only" switched on.

 

I hope this information helps you!

 

Edna.

entry.title: Re: Event Mesh Webhook to Integration Suite
entry.content: Its solved!

entry.title: Re: SAP BAS Menu Bar - Cannot be displayed on SAP BAS
entry.content: I stumbled upon the same issue. What solved it for me was to to Settings, and set Window > Menu Bar Visibility to Classic (that was the only setting that worked) :

2. If there is any stock

Like wise, what are the conditions that we need to consider in this case.

Thank you in advance !

entry.title: Module suggestion

Hi everyone,

Thank you!

entry.title: Possible use cases of ECC & S/4HANA connection with SAP Datasphere.
entry.content:
Abstract:  

SAP Datasphere provides a powerful data management and analytics platform for businesses looking to gain insights from their data. While it's possible to connect directly from SAP ECC & S/4 HANA to SAP Datasphere, using SAP BW and BW Bridge can provide several benefits. In this blog, we will explore when to connect directly to SAP Datasphere and when to use ODP (Operational Data Provisioning) through BW Bridge via SAP BW or SAP BW/4HANA systems. We will also discuss the benefits of using SAP BW and BW Bridge for data integration and transformation. 

The process described involves extracting data from ECC, S/4 systems and then passing it through the BW system, BW Bridge, and finally to SAP Datasphere. Although a direct connection is possible from ECC, S/4HANA to Datasphere, using the BW system and BW Bridge can provide several benefits. 

                                         FIG.1 Data Integration from SAP ECC to SAP Datasphere

 

When to Connect Directly to SAP Datasphere: While using SAP BW and BW Bridge can provide several benefits, there may be instances when connecting directly to SAP Datasphere is the best option. Here are some scenarios where a direct connection may be appropriate: 

  • Simple Data Integration: If you have a simple data integration scenario with a small number of data sources, a direct connection to SAP Datasphere may be sufficient (Direct Connection from SAP ECC to SAP Datasphere) 
  • Real-Time Data Integration: If you require real-time data integration between SAP ECC, S/4 HANA and SAP Datasphere, a direct connection may be the best option. 
  • No Need for Data Transformation: If your data does not require any transformation or enrichment before loading into SAP Datasphere, a direct connection may be appropriate. 

When to Use ODP through BW Bridge via SAP BW/4HANA or SAP BW Systems: While a direct connection to SAP Datasphere may be appropriate in some scenarios, using BW Bridge can provide several benefits, especially for complex data integration scenarios. Here are some scenarios when using ODP through BW Bridge may be the best option: 

  • Complex Data Integration: If you have a complex data integration scenario with multiple data sources, SAP BW and BW Bridge can provide data warehousing, data modeling, and business intelligence reporting capabilities. 
  • Data Transformation: If your data requires transformation or enrichment before loading into SAP Datasphere, SAP BW and BW Bridge can provide data transformation, data cleansing, and data enrichment capabilities. 
  • Business Content: If you want to leverage SAP BW's pre-built business content for extractors based on SAP ECC, S/4HANA, and the warehousing layer for data loading, partitioning, monitoring, and error handling, using SAP BW and BW Bridge is recommended. 
  • SAP ECC offers delta-enabled extractors for Business Warehouse (BW) that allow for incremental data extraction. However, SAP Datasphere does not offer a direct way to ingest these delta extracts. This is where SAP BW Bridge comes in. 
  • SAP BW Bridge provides an environment for IT-oriented people to implement data extraction and staging scenarios up to the Composite Provider level. This means that SAP BW Bridge can be used to extract data from SAP ECC using delta-enabled extractors, transform and enrich the data, and stage it for loading into SAP Datasphere. 

 

Benefits of Using SAP BW and BW Bridge: Using SAP BW and BW Bridge can provide several benefits, including: 

  • Data Warehousing: SAP BW provides data warehousing capabilities, allowing you to consolidate and process data from multiple sources before loading it into SAP Datasphere. 
  • Data Modeling: SAP BW provides data modeling capabilities, allowing you to create data models that can be used for reporting and analysis. 
  • Business Intelligence Reporting: SAP BW provides business intelligence reporting capabilities, allowing you to create reports and dashboards based on your data. 
  • Data Transformation: SAP BW provides data transformation capabilities, allowing you to transform and enrich your data before loading it into SAP Datasphere. 
  • Data Cleansing: SAP BW provides data cleansing capabilities, allowing you to cleanse and standardize your data before loading it into SAP Datasphere. 

 

Business Use Case for Direct Connection from ECC/S/4 Hana to SAP Datasphere:  

A manufacturing company has a few S/4 Hana systems deployed on-premise, and they want to consolidate their data in a centralized data lake for reporting and analytics purposes. The company has a small data set, and they don't require any data transformation or enrichment before loading the data into the data lake. In this scenario, it makes sense for the company to connect directly from S/4 Hana to SAP Datasphere, as it saves time and resources. 

 

Business Use Case for Connecting via ODP through BW Bridge in BW Systems:  

A retail company has multiple ECC systems deployed on-premise, and they want to consolidate their data in a centralized data warehouse for reporting and analytics purposes. The company has a large data set, and they require data transformation and enrichment before loading the data into the data warehouse.  

Additionally, the company wants to leverage the existing business content in SAP BW for extractors based on ECC, S/4 and the warehousing layer for data loading, partitioning, monitoring, and error handling. In this scenario, it makes sense for the company to connect via ODP through BW Bridge in BW systems, as it provides data warehousing, data modeling, and business intelligence reporting capabilities, allowing for data consolidation, processing, and analysis before loading it into SAP Datasphere. 

After the connection via ODP through BW Bridge to SAP Datasphere, it is possible to connect SAP ECC or S/4 directly to existing remote tables in SAP Datasphere using Open SQL or OData connectors (without the need of BW Bridge). Here are the general steps: 

  • Create a remote table in SAP Datasphere that maps to a table in SAP ECC or S/4. 
  • Configure the remote table to allow for Open SQL or OData access. 
  • Connect to the remote table using a data integration tool that supports Open SQL or OData connectors. 
  • Transform and cleanse the data as needed using data integration tools. 
  • Load the data into SAP Datasphere using data flows, data pipelines, or data replication. 

 

CONCLUSION: 

In summary, the decision to connect directly from ECC, S/4 Hana to SAP Datasphere or using ODP through BW Bridge in BW systems depends on the size of the data set, the need for data transformation and enrichment, and the desire to leverage existing business content in SAP BW for extractors based on ECC, S/4, and the warehousing layer for data loading, partitioning, monitoring, and error handling. By understanding the specific business needs and requirements, companies can choose the appropriate data integration strategy that provides better data quality, consistency, and governance.

entry.title: Re: how to set up a customize "key figure" for caculated...

Hello,

Perhaps using the ticket priority field, which you configured with the Service Level with a 24-hour deadline, could be a solution.

Clóvis Müller

entry.title: Re: SAP Managed Tags Links Don't Work on SAP Community
entry.content:
Good news! If I don't see wrong the issue has been resolved. I see the tags display correct posts. 

SAP Business One 

SAP Datasphere

Regards,
Tuncay

entry.title: Beas in Item Structure
entry.content:
Hi,

Can anyone help me on . What are the table Beas apply in Item Structure multi level BOM (Sub level Bom). How to do in sql level1, level2, level3 and level 4.I need output exactly same as item structure. Kindly help me the issue.

Thanks. 

Regards,

Seetha

entry.title: Re: Addressing Common Questions and Complaints About the New Platform
entry.content:
Hello again, @nathaliequiblier:

Thank you for the explanation. That edit would be fine, and you should be able to edit your content. If you aren't sure how, please check the Blogs section for our How-To Videos: https://pages.community.sap.com/resources/how-to-videos.

There are a few videos showing how you can edit blog content.

Kind regards,

--Jerry

entry.title: Digital Skills Initiative
entry.content:
Greetings Everyone,

I recently stumbled upon the information regarding the Digital Skills Initiative and felt motivated to reach out and express my keen interest in enhancing my skills through this Learning Program and ultimately earning a Free Attempt at Certification.

I am 46 years old and for the past 25 years, I have dedicated my career to the Hotel industry. However, fueled by a strong passion for technology, I am now looking to transition into a tech-focused career at SAP ERP and take on the new challenge of a digital upskilling. I believe that my experience has equipped me with valuable transferable skills including proficiency in customer service, communication, problem-solving and management.

Throughout my career, I have consistently dedicated time and effort to expand my technical knowledge, whether through online courses or independent study.

While embracing challenges and maintaining resilience has been a constant in my journey, I recognize that transitioning to a new industry (particularly the technology world) presents both excitement and challenges, especially at my stage in life.

Currently, I am actively exploring the courses offered by the Learning website, with the aim of obtaining certification to validate my skills and pursue new career opportunities with confidence.

I eagerly anticipate the opportunity to engage further with the Digital Skills Initiative and am hopeful for a positive response.

Kind Regards

entry.title: Crystal Reports 2020 SP4 installs, doesn't start (spins forever)
entry.content:
I've installed Crystal Reports 2020 SP4 on my MS Windows 11 workstation.    When I launch it from the desktop, it opens in a small window and never becomes responsive (spins forever).  Installed as administrator, run as administrator ... just spins.

Guess that it's trying to connect to an SAP endpoint... and is being blocked?   If so, is there someway (registry setting) to stop it from trying to reach an SAP endpoint or configure a short timeout?

Or is there an issue with high resolution screens or ...?

Thanks in advance, 

D. Dewey Allen

entry.title: Re: Unable to run a query with secondary database in capm
entry.content:
Tried with above approach but still db2.run('query 2') is failing as it running under the connection of 'db1'.

 

Error: insufficient privilege: Detailed info for this error can be found

entry.title: Re: April (Citizen) Developer Challenge – SAP Build Apps: Task 0
entry.content:
Hi @Dan_Wroblewski !

Amazing challenge 👏👏👏

Hash : f7bfec22203a53b264cc061568bfb4461d391dddf6fc189934f0c335ebf6e78d

As you can see i got a litle mixed up on the communityID.

Since then the app wont show any different value that i put on :
UI Canvas -> Variables -> App Variables -> communityID.

Any ideas?

Thanks!
